response.step_by_step_log: The video title '魔法少女ホロウィッチ！THE STAGE' was identified at the beginning. The song title 'じょいふる' appeared on screen at 01:46. I performed a search for 'じょいふる 水野良樹 Japanese and English lyrics' to identify the original artist, Ikimonogakari, and to find the lyrics. The performers were identified visually as members of Hololive.
response.global_summary: A live stage performance video featuring multiple virtual idols performing the song "Joyfull" (originally by Ikimonogakari). The video includes a brief introduction and then the full song performance.

scenes.description: Opening sequence showing the event title '魔法少女ホロウィッチ！THE STAGE' and the audience.

The virtual idols appear on stage and the song 'Joyfull' begins. The idols are: Sakura Miko, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Tsunomaki Watame, Shirakami Fubuki, and Himemori Luna. The song title 'じょいふる' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Houshou Marine, Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Tsunomaki Watame, Shirakami Fubuki, Himemori Luna

Let me hear your voice
Come on, why don't we go on an adventure?

I'll show you a peace sign like I'm confident
